name: train-evm
description: Train Protocol EVM contracts – deployment scripts

scripts.deploy:tron:nile: set FOUNDRY_PROFILE=tron && forge build && node script/deploy-tron.js nile
scripts.deploy:tron:mainnet: set FOUNDRY_PROFILE=tron && forge build && node script/deploy-tron.js mainnet
scripts.deploy:tron:shasta: set FOUNDRY_PROFILE=tron && forge build && node script/deploy-tron.js shasta
